final:
// // This module performs YCbCr color space thresholding. It checks if the Y value is outside the range [Ta, Tb] OR at least one of the Cb or Cr values is outside the range [Tc, Td].
module top_module(
    input [7:0] Y,
    input [7:0] Cb,
    input [7:0] Cr,
    input [7:0] Ta,
    input [7:0] Tb,
    input [7:0] Tc,
    input [7:0] Td,
    output reg [7:0] binary
);always @(*) begin
    if (Y >= Ta && Y <= Tb && Cb >= Tc && Cb <= Td && Cr >= Tc && Cr <= Td) begin
        binary = 8'b1;
    end else begin
        binary = 8'b0;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module performs YCbCr color space thresholding. It checks if the Y value is outside the range [Ta, Tb] OR at least one of the Cb or Cr values is outside the range [Tc, Td].
